---
title: "Prompt Engineering for Structured Medical Extraction"
description: "Working notes on prompting LLMs to extract structured clinical data reliably"
date: 2026-03-01
categories: [methods, LLM, prompt engineering]
draft : true

---

::: {.note-meta}
🌱 Seedling · Last tended <span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? Month Year</span>
:::

## Context

Extracting structured fields from free-text radiology reports is a core task in the [agentic Lémann pipeline](/projects/mre-pipeline/index.qmd). These are my working notes on what works and what doesn't.

## Key principles

<span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? Document your findings as you experiment. E.g.:</span>

### Output format specification

<span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? Notes on JSON schema prompting, XML tags, structured output modes.</span>

### Few-shot example selection

<span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? How many examples? How to select representative vs. edge cases?</span>

### Handling missing data

<span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? When a report doesn't mention a segment, is that 'normal' or 'not assessed'? How to prompt the model to distinguish.</span>

## Failure modes

<span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? Document common errors: hallucinated findings, misattributed segments, over-confident extraction from ambiguous text.</span>

## Tools & frameworks

<span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? What you're using: direct API calls, LangChain, instructor, outlines, etc.</span>

## Related

- [Agentic Lémann Pipeline](/projects/mre-pipeline/index.qmd)
- [Clinical AI pipelines](/notes/concepts/clinical-ai-pipelines.qmd)
- [Dehdab et al. 2025](/notes/papers/dehdab-2025.qmd)
